languages.text: "Я передам приказ, Ваша Светлость. Солдаты вряд ли будут довольны, но последуют вашей воле".
"I will relay the order, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The soldiers are unlikely to be pleased, but they will follow your will."
languages.original_text: "Я передам приказ, Ваша Светлость. Солдаты вряд ли будут довольны, но последуют вашей воле".

traits.locale_text: "I will relay the order, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The soldiers are unlikely to be pleased, but they will follow your will."
"I will relay the order, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The soldiers are unlikely to be pleased, but they will follow your will."
"I will relay the order, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The soldiers are unlikely to be pleased, but they will follow your will."

languages.text: 「お伺いいたします。兵士たちは喜ばないかもしれませんが、お命しに従います」
languages.original_text: "I will relay the order, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The soldiers are unlikely to be pleased, but they will follow your will."

traits.locale_text: 「お伺いいたします。兵士たちは喜ばないかもしれませんが、お命しに従います」

languages.text: «Daré la orden, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Dudo que los soldados estén contentos, pero acatarán su decisión».
languages.original_text: "I will relay the order, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The soldiers are unlikely to be pleased, but they will follow your will."

traits.locale_text: «Daré la orden, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Dudo que los soldados estén contentos, pero acatarán su decisión».

languages.text: “大人，我会传达您的指令。士兵们或许会不甘心，但他们必将遵从您的意志。”
languages.original_text: "I will relay the order, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The soldiers are unlikely to be pleased, but they will follow your will."

traits.locale_text: “大人，我会传达您的指令。士兵们或许会不甘心，但他们必将遵从您的意志。”

languages.text: "Ich werde Euren Befehl weitergeben, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Die Soldaten werden vermutlich nicht begeistert sein, aber sie werden sich Eurem Willen beugen."
languages.original_text: "I will relay the order, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The soldiers are unlikely to be pleased, but they will follow your will."

traits.locale_text: "Ich werde Euren Befehl weitergeben, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Die Soldaten werden vermutlich nicht begeistert sein, aber sie werden sich Eurem Willen beugen."

languages.text: "Emri ileteceğim {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Askerlerin memnun olması pek olası olmasa da iradenize uyacaklardır."
languages.original_text: "I will relay the order, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The soldiers are unlikely to be pleased, but they will follow your will."

traits.locale_text: "Emri ileteceğim {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Askerlerin memnun olması pek olası olmasa da iradenize uyacaklardır."

languages.text: « Je transmettrai vos ordres, Votre Seigneurie. Les soldats risquent de ne pas apprécier, mais ils obéiront. »
languages.original_text: "I will relay the order, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The soldiers are unlikely to be pleased, but they will follow your will."

traits.locale_text: « Je transmettrai vos ordres, Votre Seigneurie. Les soldats risquent de ne pas apprécier, mais ils obéiront. »
